hero_placeholder: Describe the website for your business...

advantages.title: Ready in 5 Minutes

advantages.description: Clients book services directly from the website — no calls or messaging.

advantages.title: Services and Prices

advantages.description: Website ranks in search — clients find nail technicians in the city.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Services
how_it_works.description: Manicure, pedicure, extensions — AI will understand your specialization.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Website
how_it_works.description: Ready website with portfolio, prices, and booking form will appear in seconds.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: Add work photos, set prices, and launch — clients are already looking for you.

faq.question: Can I display a portfolio of work on the website?
faq.answer: Yes, the gallery allows adding nail design, manicure, and your best work photos.

faq.question: How will clients book online?
faq.answer: The booking form allows the client to select service and convenient time — request comes to you.

faq.question: Is it suitable for a beginner technician?
faq.answer: Yes, the website works for both experienced technicians and beginners — helps build a client base.

faq.question: Will the website appear in search engines?
faq.answer: Yes, SEO optimization is included — technicians are found through Google and Yandex.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a technician website?
faq.answer: You can create a website for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain and advanced features.

faq.question: Can I specify work location and contacts?
faq.answer: Yes, the website displays the address, phone, social media, and working hours of the technician.

cta_mid_subtitle: AI will generate a stylish website with portfolio and online booking — in 5 minutes.
cta_final_subtitle: Create a website with portfolio and booking — attract clients from the internet.
